tailored.summary: I am a React Native Engineer with 4 years of experience building cross-platform mobile apps. I have a proven track record of shipping high-quality mobile apps to the App Store and Google Play, and I am proficient in TypeScript, JavaScript, and REST APIs for seamless data integration. My expertise includes implementing robust state management solutions like Redux and leveraging the Expo framework to accelerate development.

bullets: Shipped 3 cross-platform React Native mobile apps to the App Store and Google Play.
Implemented Redux for global state management, reducing component re-renders by 30%.
Integrated REST APIs for authentication, payments, and real-time notifications using Expo.
